evidence: "Chicago Med is great and I love the entire Chicago franchise."
"I was excited when this was announced as this was one of my favorite books growing up..."
"It's a very linear story which already is very cinematic and would translate well from page to screen."
"Most others had fallen flat and provided only casual entertainment."
"The movie was just so dull and boring, going nowhere..."
"A solid movie. Good action, good drama. It really kept me on the edge of my seat wondering what was going to happen."
"I get that certain stories require work to adapt..."
"The quality of these episodes is top-notch."
"I kept saying 'I hope Disney doesn't screw this up again...'"
"I have great memories of growing up watching reruns of 'Gomer Pyle' with my father."
"I did enjoy the visual depiction of the tesseract."
"The movie still gives me chills every time I watch it."
"It hits the laughs in the right places, but doesn't grind jokes so far into the ground that they cease to be funny."

additional_patterns.name: character_development
evidence: "It puts normal characters, who have their quirks that make them funny and interesting, into a unique, but believable situation."
"...the desperation of Gatsby in his lifelong quest to obtain Daisy."

summary: The user enjoys a mix of drama and comedy, with a preference for high-quality productions that evoke strong emotional responses. They appreciate visual storytelling and character development, but have mixed feelings about narrative complexity and pacing.
